steps.t: Tologlor is at the entrance of the town of Ethring, waiting for you to return with news of your successes against the Orcs. He also awaits delivery of…
Standing torches can be found throughout Ethring. You should relight any of them that have gone out.
Tologlor is at the entrance to the town of Ethring, in the Ringló Vale. You have lit some of the torches throughout Ethring, trying to drive back the …
